description: Canonical catalog of execution-v1 step ops recognized by Doppler's WebGPU runtime. Used by verify to pre-flight manifests and fail fast when a new model family references an op that has no runtime coverage. Keep this file in lock-step with src/inference/pipelines/text/layer-plan.js switch(op) and src/inference/pipelines/text/layer-plan-gpu.js switch(step.op).

embed.description: Token-embedding gather into the hidden-state residual slot.

cast.description: Explicit dtype transition declared by the execution graph.

q_proj.description: Query projection. Tiled matmul in prefill, GEMV in decode.

k_proj.description: Key projection. Tiled matmul in prefill, GEMV in decode.

v_proj.description: Value projection. Tiled matmul in prefill, GEMV in decode.

rope_q.description: Rotary embedding applied to the query projection.

rope_k.description: Rotary embedding applied to the key projection.

attention.description: Core attention operator. Variants include attn_decode, attn_stream, attn_small, attn_sliding.

gate_proj.description: Feed-forward gate projection for split FFN execution graphs.

up_proj.description: Feed-forward up projection for split FFN execution graphs.

activation.description: Feed-forward activation/gating step for split FFN execution graphs.

down_proj.description: Feed-forward down projection for split FFN execution graphs.

ffn.description: Gated feed-forward block (gate/up/down with GELU or SiLU).

final_norm.description: Final RMS norm before the LM head.

lm_head.description: Language-model head GEMV for decode-step token logits.

lm_head_prefill.description: Language-model head matmul for prefill-phase full-sequence logits.

runtimeOps.description: Coarser ops used by the JS pipeline layer-plan runtime (src/inference/pipelines/text/layer-plan.js). execution-v1 ops map onto these via the runtime dispatch.

gemma-4-text.notes: Gemma 4 E2B, 31B dense. Vision and audio towers use additional conv ops not declared in text execution graphs.
